headline: Johan Manzambi
body: 🚨🩺 All done and sealed between the clubs. Johan Manzambi’s medical with Aston Villa is scheduled for Thursday. Florian Plettenberg (Plettigoal) 🚨💥 BREAKING | Johan Manzambi to Aston Villa - DONE DEAL ✔️ ⚠️ EXCL DET: Hijack completed. Aston Villa have reached a full agreement with SC Freiburg. The total package is worth almost €70m, including add-ons, outbidding Newcastle. Aston Villa were in the race from the very beginning, as exclusively revealed. Manzambi had not given NUFC his final commitment. His camp have now informed Aston Villa that he wants to join them. Long-term contract agreed. Medical soon. SC Freiburg were unavailable for comment. SchreinerFabian SkySportDE 🇨🇭 —
raw_text:
🚨🩺 All done and sealed between the clubs. Johan Manzambi’s medical with Aston Villa is scheduled for Thursday.


Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨💥 BREAKING | Johan Manzambi to Aston Villa - DONE DEAL ✔️

⚠️ EXCL DET: Hijack completed. Aston Villa have reached a full agreement with SC Freiburg. The total package is worth almost €70m, including add-ons, outbidding Newcastle. 

Aston Villa were in the race from the very beginning, as exclusively revealed. Manzambi had not given #NUFC his final commitment. His camp have now informed Aston Villa that he wants to join them. Long-term contract agreed. Medical soon.

SC Freiburg were unavailable for comment. @SchreinerFabian @SkySportDE 🇨🇭





— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2076398519640870960#m
text:
🚨 EXCL: Aston Villa in process of finalising move to sign Johan Manzambi from Freiburg. Newcastle United had agreement with #SCF but #NUFC lacked player approval. 20yo Swiss midfielder wants #AVFC & deal now accelerating towards conclusion @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7436085…

Link



Aston Villa finalising move for Johan Manzambi from Freiburg

Newcastle had reached a club-to-club agreement with Freiburg for the 20-year-old but he now favours a move to Villa Park.
nytimes.com
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- JOHAN MANZAMBI CONFIRMED TRANSFER FROM NEWCASTLE UNITED TO ASTON VILLA.
💰 PRICE — €70M
📝 CONTRACT — Long-Term Deal

#AVFC #NUFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague
